violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
3 bay sink is lacking a faucet head to adequately fill all 3 compartments. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the dining area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
